backend/main.mo: Defines the main canister actor with all data models, storage maps, access control, and helper functions for user‑scoped data handling.
backend/migration.mo: Provides a no-op migration module that copies all fields from the old actor state to the new structure without transformation.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence entries mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists human-written summaries for multiple frontend files describing their responsibilities and recent modifications.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point mounting the React application and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Initializes PDF.js globally and implements the root React app with authentication, profile setup flow, navigation events, and page routing.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Renders the responsive layout with sidebar, header, user menu, theme toggle, and navigation handling.
frontend/src/components/BaseDialog.tsx: Provides a reusable dialog component with consistent styling, controlled open state, and optional trigger support.
frontend/src/components/CalendarView.tsx: Renders an interactive monthly calendar showing projects and tasks based on date ranges, with navigation between months.
frontend/src/components/CalendarWidget.t: Displays a compact list of upcoming project start dates and task deadlines, sorted and limited to the next five events.
frontend/src/components/CostItemsSection: Manages a project's cost items, allowing adding, listing, removing items, and showing total calculated cost.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: Reusable confirmation dialog for deletions with customizable text and pending-state handling.
frontend/src/components/DynamicSelect.ts: Select component that allows choosing from options and adding new options via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Captures rendering errors and displays a fallback error UI with reload functionality.
frontend/src/components/PDFThumbnail.tsx: Generates and caches PDF thumbnails using PDF.js and localStorage, with retry and error handling. Renders a canvas or fallback icon depending on load state.
frontend/src/components/PDFViewer.tsx: Empty placeholder file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal form for collecting and saving a user's name, email, and user type. Submits data via a profile‑save mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProjectTimelineI: Date input component that toggles between exact dates and month ranges. Emits changes for start and end fields in both modes.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPDFViewer: Full‑screen PDF viewer with page navigation, zoom, caching, and thumbnail rendering. Uses PDF.js and memoized canvas rendering for performance.
frontend/src/components/UpcomingTasksWid: Displays up to seven upcoming tasks sorted by due date with project context and urgency coloring. Clicking a task triggers a callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity React context and provider wrapping Dfinity AuthClient, exposing identity, login, logout, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating tasks, profiles, projects, media, and contacts through an actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light and dark theme variables and base styles.
frontend/src/lib/customCategories.ts: Manages customizable category lists using localStorage with defaults and helpers for reading and updating them.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Provides date conversion and formatting helpers, week calculations, and month-range utilities using bigint timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/focusManager.ts: Offers hooks for auto‑focusing elements in dialogs and restoring focus when closing them.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, setting up QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx: Provides UI for managing contacts and helpful links, including creation, editing, deletion, and filtering with search and category/role filters.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Implements the main dashboard with project and task management, timelines, cost summaries, and dialogs for creating projects and tasks.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Handles PDF document management with upload queues, categorization, previews, folder expansion, and deletion dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Kostenuebersicht.tsx: Displays and manages cost items with editing, filtering, sorting, document linking, and project associations.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Simple login screen that authenticates users via Internet Identity with descriptive marketing content.
frontend/src/pages/Media.tsx: Manages media files with grid/list views, drag-and-drop reordering, uploading, editing, and PDF/image preview support.
frontend/src/pages/Roadmap.tsx: Roadmap page that loads, filters, and manages projects with create/edit/delete dialogs, timeline modes, categories, and cost items.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Tasks page implementing task listing, filtering, creation, editing, and deletion with category, project, and urgency controls.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining themes, colors, animations, plugins, and content paths.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing scope, known issues, and feature requests for restoring contact and link creation.
